name: axis_fifo
description: AXI-stream ready/valid FIFO for elastic packet or sample buffering with tdata ordering.

source_refs.notes: Full AXI-stream FIFO with frame-aware options; this skill keeps a compact data-only teaching subset.

parameters.name: DEPTH
parameters.description: FIFO entries; use larger depths for burst absorption.

states.name: EMPTY
states.description: No valid stream words are stored.

states.name: PARTIAL
states.description: Some stream words are stored and order must be preserved.

states.name: FULL
states.description: All entries are occupied; deassert input ready unless an output word is accepted.

constraints: Use for same-clock AXI-stream-like buffering, not clock-domain crossing.
Preserve input order and never drop accepted tdata words.
Hold m_axis_tdata stable while m_axis_tvalid is high and m_axis_tready is low.
Use axis_srl_fifo for very small LUT/SRL buffering and axis_pipeline_fifo for timing pipeline stages.
patterns: Map ready/valid handshakes onto FIFO write and read enables.
Compute s_axis_tready from FIFO vacancy or simultaneous output acceptance.
Use circular pointers and a count register for deterministic full/empty behavior.
implementation_notes: Keep the teaching template data-only; add tkeep, tlast, tid, or tuser only when requested.
Handle simultaneous input and output handshakes without changing occupancy.
Favor this skill when the query asks for elastic stream storage, burst absorption, or occupancy count.
Do not select this skill merely for a one-word skid buffer.
test_strategy: Push multiple words while downstream is stalled.
Exercise simultaneous input and output transfers.
verification_goals: Every accepted input tdata appears once at the output in order.
s_axis_tready deasserts when occupancy reaches DEPTH without output acceptance.
m_axis_tdata remains stable under downstream backpressure.
count tracks occupancy across fill, drain, and simultaneous transfer.
